name: generation-time trace records freshness_status per consulted source as fresh or stale
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/last-fetch && printf '2026-05-13T00:00:00Z\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/last-fetch/cfpb.txt && printf '{"event":"generation","consulted_prs":[{"number":1,"source_id":"cfpb"}]}\n' > event.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/consumption-trace.sh" --event event.json --out pr-corpus/consumption-trace.jsonl --now 2026-05-13T01:00:00Z --freshness-window 24h 2>err.txt && grep -q '"freshness_status":"fresh"' pr-corpus/consumption-trace.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
